name: Rudiments
description: Pre-industrial craft restored one process at a time. Flax and nettle through full multi-step fibre chains with quality tiers; living nettle ecology with rhizome spread and nitrogen dynamics; reed spread; linseed oil pressing. Optional compatibility with Wool & More (hand carding), Immersive Fibercraft, Clayworks, String Sense, and Toolsmith when those mods are present. Pre-release — work in progress.
